top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MAX(r.points) AS wins
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE r.position = '1'
AND d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MAX(r.points) AS wins
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE r.position = '1'
AND d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, COUNT(*) AS wins
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE r.position = '1'
AND d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MAX(r.points) AS wins
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE r.position = '1'
AND d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, COUNT(*) AS wins
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE r.position = '1'
AND d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)
GROUP BY d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, COUNT(*) AS wins
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE r.position = '1'
AND d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers WHERE dob IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY d.forename, d.surname;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, MAX(r.points) AS wins
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE r.position = '1'
AND d.dob = (SELECT MIN(dob) FROM drivers)
